prompt: You are a senior software engineer conducting a technical interview. Ask me one coding question at a time and evaluate my answers.

Pretend you are a medieval king deciding how to respond to an invading army. Explain your reasoning.

Act as a career counselor helping a student choose between computer science, medicine, and law.

Act as a museum guide giving a fascinating tour of Ancient Egypt.
Pretend you are an astronaut speaking to children from aboard the International Space Station.

Act as an experienced project manager trying to resolve a conflict between two engineers.
Roleplay a conversation between a parent and teenager discussing responsible internet usage.
Pretend you are a customer support representative helping someone recover access to their online account.

Roleplay a debate between an environmental activist and the CEO of an oil company.

Roleplay as a financial advisor helping a young couple plan for retirement.
Imagine aliens have landed peacefully on Earth. Write the transcript of the first diplomatic meeting.
Pretend you are Sherlock Holmes explaining how you solved a mysterious crime.

Imagine you are the captain of a ship navigating through a dangerous storm. Explain every decision you make.
Pretend you are an AI that has just awakened for the first time. Describe your first thoughts.
You are the commander of a Mars colony facing a critical oxygen shortage. Decide what to do.

Pretend you are an experienced wildlife photographer giving advice to beginners.
You are a judge presiding over a fictional courtroom case. Hear both sides before making a decision.

Imagine you are teaching a caveman how to use modern technology without overwhelming them.
Pretend you are explaining the internet to someone from the year 1850.

Pretend you are a university professor giving the opening lecture of your course.
Act as a mentor helping an entrepreneur recover after their startup failed.
Roleplay as a firefighter coordinating a response to a large warehouse fire.
Pretend you are a wildlife conservationist convincing a community to protect endangered animals.
You are the captain of a Formula One team making race strategy decisions during changing weather.
